summary: Biometric Unlock at Login (P2) — Frontend graceful-degradation verified on Expo web preview. All 12 checks PASS. Biometric UI is correctly hidden on web (hasHardwareAsync=false): no login-biometric-button banner, no biometric-hint text, no enable-biometric-confirm post-login modal, no open-biometric-toggle in Settings. Sign-in with test1@plos.app/test123 routes directly to /(tabs). Existing settings rows (change-password, sign-out, seed-data, delete-account) render intact. Change Password modal opens correctly. Source static checks confirm biometric.ts exports all required functions and login.tsx/settings.tsx import them with the expected testIDs. No new console errors or page errors. Password restored/preserved as test123 (confirmed via direct /api/auth/login).
critical_code_review_comments: biometric.ts: All public functions guard `Platform.OS === 'web'` and return safe defaults — clean graceful degradation pattern.

login.tsx: Banner rendering is gated by `cap.available && bioEnabled && storedEmail` and the opt-in modal by `cap.available && !bioEnabled`. On web cap.available is forced to false, so both UI surfaces are dead-code on web. Good.
settings.tsx: Biometric row gated by `bioCap.hardware || bioCap.available` — on web both are false so row is not rendered. Good.
Pre-existing deprecation warnings in console ('shadow*' style props, props.pointerEvents) are unrelated to this feature and were present in earlier iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Native biometric flows (LocalAuthentication.authenticateAsync, SecureStore credential persistence, enable/disable from Settings) cannot be exercised in the web preview — must be validated on iOS/Android dev build. The Playwright preview only verifies graceful hiding on web. Note: the bottom-sheet Change Password modal renders close button below viewport at 375x667 — minor cosmetic, not a regression.

checks.B7_existing_settings_rows_render: PASS (open-change-password, settings-sign-out, settings-seed-data, open-delete-account all present)
checks.B8_change_password_modal_opens: PASS (modal opens with pw-current/pw-new/pw-confirm/pw-submit visible; password verified still test123 via /api/auth/login)
checks.C9_biometric_ts_exports: PASS (detectBiometricCapability, authenticate, isBiometricEnabled, getStoredEmail, enableBiometricLogin, readStoredCredentials, disableBiometricLogin)
checks.C10_login_tsx_imports_and_testids: PASS (imports from @/src/lib/biometric; testIDs login-biometric-button, enable-biometric-confirm, enable-biometric-skip present)
checks.C11_settings_tsx_imports_and_testids: PASS (imports from @/src/lib/biometric; testIDs open-biometric-toggle, bio-password, bio-submit, bio-close present)
checks.C12_no_console_errors: PASS (0 errors, 0 pageerrors; only pre-existing deprecation warnings unrelated to feature)

credentials_state: test1@plos.app password is test123 (verified via direct API POST /api/auth/login → 200 with token; POST with Plos2026! → 401). No restoration required.
